scripts.antlr4:generate: mkdir -p src/generated && java -jar tools/antlr-4.13.2-complete.jar -Dlanguage=JavaScript -visitor -no-listener grammars/SqlLexer.g4 && mv grammars/SqlLexer.js grammars/SqlLexer.tokens grammars/SqlLexer.interp src/generated/ && java -jar tools/antlr-4.13.2-complete.jar -Dlanguage=JavaScript -visitor -no-listener -lib src/generated grammars/SqlParser.g4 && mv grammars/SqlParser.js grammars/SqlParser.tokens grammars/SqlParser.interp grammars/SqlParserVisitor.js src/generated/
